companies.name: Apple Inc.
companies.rationale: Apple is a major customer of TSMC, relying heavily on their advanced semiconductor manufacturing processes for its products.

companies.name: NVIDIA Corporation
companies.rationale: NVIDIA designs GPUs and relies on TSMC's manufacturing capabilities for production.

companies.name: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
companies.rationale: AMD uses TSMC to fabricate its CPUs and GPUs, making it significantly dependent on TSMC.

companies.name: QUALCOMM Incorporated
companies.rationale: QUALCOMM relies on TSMC for the production of some of its semiconductor components.

overall_rationale: The analysis focuses on major semiconductor companies that rely on TSMC for manufacturing their chips, including Apple, NVIDIA, AMD, and Qualcomm. Reviewing their 10-K and 10-Q filings over the past three years will provide insights into how they describe their dependence on TSMC, as these filings typically contain detailed risk factors and operational dependencies.
